allow: PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Ollama;$env:Path"; & ollama list; Write-Output "--- server check ---"; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:11434/api/version -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5\).Content } catch { "Server not responding: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
